description.content: Returns a list of matching permit records based on geographic location and date range filters. Supports advanced filtering by permit status, tags, job value, property type, building area, and more.

query.description: (Required) Location filter (address, city, zip code, county, jurisdiction, or state geo_id)
(Required) Return permits issued on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)
(Required) Return permits issued on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)
Filter by permit status (issued, approved, completed, expired, cancelled)
Filter by property type (residential, commercial, industrial)
Number of results per page (1-100, default 50)
Include total count in response (capped at 10,000)

response.name: List of permits matching the search criteria

The Shovels API provides building permit intelligence and contractor data aggregated from 1,800+ jurisdictions across the United States. Access 130M+ building permits, 2.3M+ contractor profiles, property details, resident information, and geographic metrics. The API is used by materials suppliers, construction tech companies, energy and climate firms, home services companies, real estate professionals, and telecommunications providers to power sales, marketing, and market analytics.
